subcodes.first_line: O thou who art athirst! Don thy pilgrim's garb for the Ka'bah of thy heart's desire and make thy way unto its sacred precincts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای تشنه پر عطش احرام کعبهٌ مقصود بربند وقصد حل وحرم
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
